name: Salsa Cruda#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cilantro in the bowl.
2. Drop the garlic and chili through the feed tube and process until minced.
3. Add onion and combine until minced.
4. Turn off the machine.
5. Add remaining ingredients and process for 10 pulses until coarsely chopped.
6. Do not overprocess.
7. Can be prepared up to 4 hours in advance.
8. Cover tightly and refrigerate.
9. Drain any liquid and adjust seasoning before serving.
